subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath been named Muhsin, that he may inhale the fragrance of the utterance of the All-Merciful and be numbered among the steadfast. How many a mighty one hath turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بمحسن لیجد عرف بیان الرحمن و یکون من الراسخین کم من قوی اعرض
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
